_comment: Role-stratified bias corrections v5. Updated 2026-07-09 after LogLinear opp-adj unit-mismatch fix changed global corrections. Turnover role corrections updated from 0.658 to 1.264 (new global) to restore net_mult≈1.0 (no role differentiation for TO). All other role corrections unchanged — they represent absolute total multipliers (final = raw * role_corr) independent of the global value. net_mult = role_corr / global_corr applied in apply_role_stratified_corrections.
